THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEAL, DEBORAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1155 ELLIS STREET #B-302, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JAN-14-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. WRIT MAY ISSUE ONLY AFTER 1-14-97 UPON PLTF DECLARATION THAT DEFT HAS FILED TO VACATE BY MIDNIGHT 1-14-97.
